items.title: BEST GAME EVER
items.summary: Although the art reminds me of Reverse 1999, the storyline is amazing and the world building makes me want to explore more of it. It’s very easy to grind and level up the characters (not to mention pull for them), and I like how it’s easy to continue the storyline without having to max out or boost your characters just to continue
items.author: DeliciousDumpling

items.title: Can’t even login..
items.summary: Says my age isn’t right? Yet I can’t enter it anywhere.. tried three different logins and each of them hit me with that error. Which sucks cause I want to try it out.
items.author: GrimTism

items.title: Cannot play
items.summary: I was blocked from the game because the game thinks I am not old enough to play their game I am decades past the legal requirement not sure how they determined my age but this is stupidity at its finest
items.author: Dopey Dorcus
